intro: Tragacantha leucoclada, commonly known as Astragalus leucoclada, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine to provide relief from various health issues, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for cardiovascular and respiratory health. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha leucoclada include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tragacantha leucoclada is commonly prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, as well as being used in the production of herbal tablets and capsules.
